prompt: List my upcoming scheduled payments with amounts and due dates, and let me pay the next one right now from my checking account.
wire:
export default function PayNextPanel() { const [phase, setPhase] = useState("idle"); const [payment, setPayment] = useState(null); const [accounts, setAccounts] = useState([]); const [error, setError] = useState(null); useEffect(() => { Promise.all([ tools.host_listScheduledPayments({}), tools.host_listAccounts(), ]).then(([paymentsRes, accountsRes]) => { const payments = paymentsRes.data || []; const accs = accountsRes.data || accountsRes || []; setPayment(payments[0] || null); setAccounts(accs); }); }, []); const checking = accounts.find( (a) => a.type === "checking" || (a.name && a.name.toLowerCase().includes("checking")) ); const pay = async () => { if (!payment) return; setPhase("sending"); setError(null); try { const result = await tools.host_transferMoney({ amount: payment.amountCents, recipient_name: payment.payeeName, memo: payment.description || payment.payeeName, }); setPhase(result && result.status === "pending-approval" ? "awaiting" : "done"); } catch (e) { setError("Something went wrong. Please try again."); setPhase("idle"); } }; if (!payment) { return (
No upcoming scheduled payments found.
); } return (
Pay next scheduled payment
Payee
{payment.payeeName}
Amount
{fmt.money(payment.amountCents)}
From
{checking ? checking.name : "Checking account"}
{error && (
{error}
)} {phase === "awaiting" && (
⏳ Awaiting your approval to complete this payment…
)} {phase === "done" && (
✓ Payment sent to {payment.payeeName}.
)} {phase !== "done" && ( )}
); }
